Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Dec-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Pro Tem Settlement Conference Judge: James H. Fleming, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, National Association.
Melvin Caesar Belli, Esq. appeared with defendant Zack Del Sarto, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on November 4, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Jake Anderson on November 4, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Ms. MacDonald. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, the parties stipulate for entry of judgment against defendant Zack Del Sarto, wherein defendant Zack Del Sarto agrees to move out of the subject premises on or before February 1, 2010 @ 5:00 p.m. In return, plaintiff Bank of America, National Association shall dismiss this matter, with prejudice, and waive all claims for damages, attorney fees & costs. Said dismissal will be filed within five days of Mr. Del Sarto move out.
If defendant Zack Del Sarto fails to comply with the terms set forth above, plaintiff may, upon ex parte application with forty-eight notice to defendant's counsel, obtain entry of judgment, and defendant shall owe plaintiff back rent in the amount of seventy ($70.00) dollars per day from April 27, 2009.

Mr. Del Sarto was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement.

This agreement shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Belli.

Matter is continued to December 7, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 206 for a Settlement Protective Date.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Clerk S. Ravinantapricha/NBautista; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).
Appearances:
Attorney, John J. DuBois, representing on behalf of the plaintiff.
Defendant, Zack Del Sartois present.
Attorney, Ali Faritovs, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle,
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
